title: GitHub Actions CI: build resume and attach PDF as artifact
description:
Set up a GitHub Actions workflow that:
- Triggers on push to master
- Uses texlive/texlive:latest container
- Installs required fonts (fonts-roboto, fonts-adobe-sourcesans3)
- Compiles resume.tex with lualatex
- Uploads resume.pdf as a build artifact via actions/upload-artifact
- Reference Awesome-CV/.github/workflows/main.yml for the pattern

title: Add cover letter template
description: Add a coverletter.tex based on the Awesome-CV coverletter example. Include it in the Makefile build targets.

title: Consider additional resume sections
description:
Evaluate whether to add more sections from the Awesome-CV examples:
- resume/honors.tex (awards)
- resume/certificates.tex (certifications)
- resume/extracurricular.tex
- resume/writing.tex (publications)
- resume/presentation.tex (talks)

title: Install Docker on local machine
description:
Docker is not yet installed. Need to run:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker.io
sudo usermod -aG docker $USER
Then log out/in or run newgrp docker. Required for local make to work.

title: Set up Git tag-based versioning for resume releases
description:
Implement a versioning strategy for the resume:
- Use git tags (e.g., v1.0, v2025.03.07) to mark release versions
- Optionally update the GitHub Actions workflow to create a GitHub Release with the PDF attached when a tag is pushed
- Consider date-based versioning (YYYY.MM.DD) since resumes are updated infrequently
close_reason: Added GitHub Release step to CI workflow. Tags (v2025.MM.DD) trigger a release with resume.pdf attached directly.

title: Fill in resume content with personal information
description:
Replace all placeholder content in resume.tex and resume/ section files with actual personal info:
- resume.tex: name, position, address, contact details
- resume/summary.tex: professional summary
- resume/experience.tex: work history
- resume/skills.tex: technical and other skills
- resume/education.tex: degrees and certifications
